chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-639 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.3827/2025 2. For orders on o/objection at flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.3828/2025 4. For hearing of bail application. 30.07.2025 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Malik, Advocate for the Applicants/Accused.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through instant bail application, applicants/accuseds namely Muhammad Suleman S/O Muhammad Bux @ Muhammad, Muhammad Aslam @ Asloo S/O Suleman, Ali Khan S/O Mehmood, Nadeem S/O Mehmood, Babar Ali S/O Mehmood, Hussain Bux @ Hussaino S/O Sohbat Ali, all by caste Shar, seek protective bail in Crime No.55/2025, registered at Police Station Khanpur Mahar, Dist: Ghotki, u/s 302, 311, 310-A, 337A(i), 337F(i), 147, 148, 149, 504 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicants/accused are innocent and have falsely been implicated by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motive; that all the PWs are kith and kin, hence they are interested; that the applicants/ accused are ready to surrender before the Court concerned but apprehend their arrest and humiliation at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicants/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicants/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicants/accused fail to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, their bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE S. Nawaz(St)’
